infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MoodFit uses your location to get accurate weather data for outfit recommendations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MoodFit needs access to your photo library to upload clothing images.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MoodFit uses the camera to capture clothing photos.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: MoodFit uses your location for weather-based outfit recommendations.

plugins.photosPermission: MoodFit accesses your photos to add clothing items to your wardrobe.
